title: Building a Production-Ready Online Pharmacy from Scratch
excerpt: Every architectural decision in a regulated e-health platform carries legal and safety implications. Here's how I designed, built, and launched a fully compliant pharmacy.
body:
The Challenge

Building a regulated e-commerce pharmacy is not like building a regular online shop. Every decision carries legal and safety implications. Products must be verified, orders must be traceable, and customers must trust the platform with their health.

Architecture

I chose a decoupled architecture: React frontend, Node.js/Express API, MongoDB datastore. Each layer is independently deployable and scalable.

Key Lesson

In any platform that handles health-related products, trust and reliability are everything.

title: RBAC Done Right: Securing Multi-Role Healthcare Platforms
excerpt: A practical guide to Role-Based Access Control in regulated environments — from schema design to middleware patterns and audit logging.
body:
Why RBAC Matters in Healthcare

A pharmacy platform needs precise access scoping. Customers, pharmacists, admins, and delivery staff each need different views and capabilities.

Audit Trails

Every state-changing action writes to an append-only audit log with actor, timestamp, and before/after state. Non-negotiable in regulated environments.

title: IoT-Driven Irrigation: Lessons from 9 Years in Commercial Floriculture
excerpt: Real-world insights from operating Gavish computerised irrigation systems — and how those skills transfer directly to software engineering.
body:
The Scale of the Problem

Managing irrigation and nutrient delivery across dozens of greenhouses is a precision data problem. Too little water and you lose a crop.

What This Taught Me

Running 24/7 systems where failure means crop loss teaches you to design for reliability from first principles.

title: M-Pesa API Integration: A Complete Developer Guide for Node.js
excerpt: OAuth token management, STK Push flow, callback handling, idempotency, and every production pitfall of the M-Pesa Daraja API.
body:
Token Management

Cache your access token — never fetch a new one on every request. Tokens last 60 minutes; cache for 59 and refresh proactively.

Idempotency

Callbacks can arrive more than once. Always check if the transaction ID already exists in your database before processing.

title: From Fertigation Technician to Full-Stack Developer
excerpt: How a decade operating computerised agricultural systems shaped my engineering perspective — and why cross-domain experience is a genuine technical advantage.
body:
An Unconventional Path

I spent years operating precision computerised systems in the cut flower industry before transitioning into software.

The Advantage

When I build AgriTech software today, I have lived the domain. That makes the difference between software that looks correct and software that actually works in the field.

title: Preventing SQL Injection & XSS in Django and Node.js
excerpt: Side-by-side security patterns across frameworks with real code examples and the common mistakes to avoid in production.
body:
SQL Injection

Never build queries by concatenating user input. Always use parameterised queries or an ORM.

Content Security Policy

A strict CSP header prevents inline script execution even if an injection vulnerability slips through code review.
